NOPE STUDIO.

About

NOPE is a small studio. We make websites, apps, and digital things. The name is intentional. We say no to most things. Not out of stubbornness — out of conviction. Most things don't need to exist. Extra features nobody asked for. Pages that fill space. Design that decorates instead of communicates. Copy that sounds like it was written by a committee. We remove all of it. What's left is usually better.
This is minimalism, but not as an aesthetic. As a method. Every decision starts with a question: does this need to be here? If the answer isn't clearly yes, it goes. We apply this to everything — the work we take on, the words we write, the pixels we place.
We take design seriously. Not as decoration but as communication. The typeface, the spacing, the colour, the weight of a line — each one is a decision. Decisions made carelessly produce work that feels wrong even when people can't say why. We make them carefully.
Good design disappears. You stop noticing it and start using it. NOPE is very much me. I don't talk if I don't have to. I don't fluff. I keep things minimal — in work and in life. The brand isn't a strategy. It's just how I think. — Eddie

© 2026 NOPE,

Made with soul. Made by people.
